title: AI is Going LOCAL! Edge AI & Local Agents Explained #shorts
summary: A short-form video discusses the shift toward edge AI and local agents for data-sensitive sectors like finance and healthcare. The content emphasizes security, privacy, and computational power as key benefits of deploying AI locally rather than on centralized cloud infrastructure.
